holdings.infoBox: SGDJ is an equity ETF with a total of 37 individual holdings. The top holdings are Centerra Gold stock at 4.74%, Vault Minerals at 4.60%, Kingsgate Consolidated at 4.48%, Aris Mining at 4.39%, and Turk Altin Isletmeleri AS at 4.22%.

overview.description: The Sprott Junior Gold Miners ETF (SGDJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund tracks an equity index of small-cap gold mining firms. Stocks are weighted by price momentum for gold explorers and by revenue growth for gold developers. SGDJ was launched on Mar 31, 2015 and is issued by Sprott.
infoTable: Solactive Junior Gold Miners Custom Factors Index

data.title: The Case for Gold Miners: Why Supply Scarcity is Key
data.text: While gold has proved to be a hot commodity for the last few months, some naysayers have looked at March's short-term volatility as a reason to stay away from the precious metal for now.
